message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber off

participant "张三" as ZS
participant "李四" as LS

alt [借钱案例]
    ZS -> LS : 我要借钱
    loop [循环借钱100次]
        rect rgb(255,255,255)
            group 成功案例
                LS -->> ZS : 借给你
            end
        endrect
        ZS -> LS : 我要还钱
        LS -->> ZS : 收到欠款
    end
else [借钱失败]
    ZS -> LS : 我还要借钱
    LS -->> ZS : 不借了
end

@enduml
```
